p1.name: Corp
p1.description: Stores basic information for corporate entities, uniquely identified by an ID.

p1.name: Division
p1.description: Defines specific business units or segments belonging to a parent corporate entity, facilitating organizational hierarchy and reporting.

p1.name: Department
p1.description: Represents specific functional units within a division, organizing personnel and resources to execute specialized tasks or business operations.

p1.name: Team
p1.description: Defines specific operational groups within a department, facilitating the organization of personnel for collaborative task execution and project management.

p1.name: Squad
p1.description: This table defines granular sub-groups within teams, enabling precise allocation of personnel to specific functional tasks or specialized project delivery units.

p1.name: Member
p1.description: This table identifies individual personnel and establishes their formal association with specific squads to facilitate organized task execution and accountability.

p1.name: Task
p1.description: This table records individual work assignments linked to specific personnel, facilitating the management and tracking of discrete activities within the organization.

p1.name: Subtask
p1.description: This table defines granular components of parent tasks, enabling detailed tracking of specific steps required to complete a broader work assignment.

p1.name: Step
p1.description: This table defines specific sequential actions necessary to fulfill a subtask, representing the most granular level of operational detail within the workflow.

p1.name: Action
p1.description: This table records individual executable operations linked to specific steps, representing the final level of task execution within the workflow hierarchy.

p2a.name: Step
p2a.whatChanged: Updated to reflect that steps are no longer the most granular level, as they contain executable actions.
p2a.beforeDesc: This table defines sequential procedures required to complete a subtask, serving as the parent container for individual executable operations.
p2a.afterDesc: This table defines sequential procedures required to complete a subtask, serving as the parent container for individual executable operations.

p2a.name: Subtask
p2a.whatChanged: Updated to reflect its role as a parent container for sequential procedures and executable operations.
p2a.beforeDesc: This table defines granular components of parent tasks that serve as containers for sequential procedures and executable operations within a workflow.
p2a.afterDesc: This table defines granular components of parent tasks that serve as containers for sequential procedures and executable operations within a workflow.

p2a.name: Task
p2a.whatChanged: Added that the table acts as a parent container for granular subtasks and sequential procedures.
p2a.beforeDesc: This table records individual work assignments and serves as a parent container for granular subtasks and sequential procedures within organizational workflows.
p2a.afterDesc: This table records individual work assignments and serves as a parent container for granular subtasks and sequential procedures within organizational workflows.

p2a.name: Member
p2a.whatChanged: Refined the description to emphasize the table's direct role in task assignment based on the descendant relationship with the Task table.
p2a.beforeDesc: This table identifies personnel, establishes squad memberships, and serves as the foundational entity for assigning and managing individual work tasks.
p2a.afterDesc: This table identifies personnel, establishes squad memberships, and serves as the foundational entity for assigning and managing individual work tasks.

p2a.name: Squad
p2a.whatChanged: Incorporated the role of squads in managing individual memberships and task assignments as indicated by the descendant table.
p2a.beforeDesc: This table defines team sub-groups that organize personnel into functional units for managing individual memberships and the assignment of specific work tasks.
p2a.afterDesc: This table defines team sub-groups that organize personnel into functional units for managing individual memberships and the assignment of specific work tasks.

p2a.name: Team
p2a.whatChanged: Added context regarding the table's role as a parent structure for further organizational subdivisions based on the existence of sub-groups.
p2a.beforeDesc: Defines operational groups within a department that organize personnel for collaborative projects and provide the structural basis for further organizational subdivision.
p2a.afterDesc: Defines operational groups within a department that organize personnel for collaborative projects and provide the structural basis for further organizational subdivision.

p2a.name: Department
p2a.whatChanged: Added context regarding the department's role as a structural parent for operational teams.
p2a.beforeDesc: Functional units within a division that organize personnel and resources into operational teams to execute specialized tasks and business operations.
p2a.afterDesc: Functional units within a division that organize personnel and resources into operational teams to execute specialized tasks and business operations.

p2a.name: Division
p2a.whatChanged: Added context regarding the division's role as a parent entity for functional departments.
p2a.beforeDesc: Represents major business segments within a corporate structure that act as parent entities for functional departments and operational teams.
p2a.afterDesc: Represents major business segments within a corporate structure that act as parent entities for functional departments and operational teams.

p2a.name: Corp
p2a.whatChanged: Added context regarding the table's role as the primary root for business segments and organizational hierarchies.
p2a.beforeDesc: Stores foundational data for corporate entities that serve as the top-level parent for major business segments and operational hierarchies.
p2a.afterDesc: Stores foundational data for corporate entities that serve as the top-level parent for major business segments and operational hierarchies.

p2b.name: Step
p2b.whatChanged: Refined the description to include the workflow hierarchy context provided by the descendant table information.
p2b.beforeDesc: This table defines sequential procedures for subtasks, serving as the organizational layer for specific actions within the workflow hierarchy.
p2b.afterDesc: This table defines sequential procedures for subtasks, serving as the organizational layer for specific actions within the workflow hierarchy.

p2b.name: Subtask
p2b.whatChanged: Refined the description to emphasize the subtask's role in organizing procedures and actions within a structured workflow hierarchy.
p2b.beforeDesc: This table defines granular components of parent tasks that organize sequential procedures and actions within a structured workflow hierarchy.
p2b.afterDesc: This table defines granular components of parent tasks that organize sequential procedures and actions within a structured workflow hierarchy.

p2b.name: Task
p2b.whatChanged: The current description already accurately reflects the hierarchical relationship and workflow context provided by the descendant table information.
p2b.beforeDesc: This table records individual work assignments and serves as a parent container for granular subtasks and sequential procedures within organizational workflows.
p2b.afterDesc: This table records individual work assignments and serves as a parent container for granular subtasks and sequential procedures within organizational workflows.

p2b.name: Member
p2b.whatChanged: Refined the description to emphasize the member's role in structured organizational workflows based on the task hierarchy.
p2b.beforeDesc: This table identifies personnel and squad memberships, acting as the central entity for assigning work tasks within structured organizational workflows.
p2b.afterDesc: This table identifies personnel and squad memberships, acting as the central entity for assigning work tasks within structured organizational workflows.

p2b.name: Squad
p2b.whatChanged: Refined the description to emphasize the squad's role in facilitating structured work task assignments as indicated by its descendants.
p2b.beforeDesc: This table defines functional team sub-groups that organize personnel into units for managing memberships and facilitating structured work task assignments.
p2b.afterDesc: This table defines functional team sub-groups that organize personnel into units for managing memberships and facilitating structured work task assignments.

p2b.name: Team
p2b.whatChanged: Refined the description of subdivisions to 'functional, task-oriented subgroups' to reflect the specific nature of the referencing Squad table.
p2b.beforeDesc: Defines operational groups within a department that organize personnel for collaborative projects and provide the structural basis for functional, task-oriented subgroups.
p2b.afterDesc: Defines operational groups within a department that organize personnel for collaborative projects and provide the structural basis for functional, task-oriented subgroups.

p2b.name: Department
p2b.whatChanged: Refined to emphasize the department's role as a structural framework for collaborative teams based on descendant information.
p2b.beforeDesc: Functional units within a division that provide the structural framework for organizing personnel and resources into collaborative teams to execute specialized tasks and business operations.
p2b.afterDesc: Functional units within a division that provide the structural framework for organizing personnel and resources into collaborative teams to execute specialized tasks and business operations.

p2b.name: Division
p2b.whatChanged: Refined the description to incorporate the specific focus on personnel and resource organization mentioned in the department descendant information.
p2b.beforeDesc: Major business segments within a corporate structure that serve as parent entities for organizing functional departments, personnel, and operational resources.
p2b.afterDesc: Major business segments within a corporate structure that serve as parent entities for organizing functional departments, personnel, and operational resources.

p2b.name: Corp
p2b.whatChanged: Updated terminology to specifically reference divisions and tightened the sentence structure for better clarity.
p2b.beforeDesc: Stores foundational data for corporate entities serving as the top-level parent for divisions and their associated operational hierarchies.
p2b.afterDesc: Stores foundational data for corporate entities serving as the top-level parent for divisions and their associated operational hierarchies.
